transcript_quality: summary only — no call recording on file
lead_profile_text: Previously Airbnb'd through a local agency; took a break due to damage accumulation (smashed bathroom door lock, cracked ceramic tiles); returning to STL with a new manager. Daughter lived in property during university; now vacant. Currently listed on Rightmove while sell-side interest is weak.
emotional_profile: Guarded — experienced with STL but burned by prior operator. Reassurance-seeking; responded well to specific operational detail rather than general claims. Risk-averse due to prior damage experience and new-company scepticism.
delay_trigger_phrases: will decide within 2 weeks, definitely before 30 June
delay_timeline: 2 weeks from meeting date; decision by 30 June 2026

top_objections.text: Stayful being a relatively new company (2023 for management) — credibility and track record concern
top_objections.zac_response: Referenced ~70 properties managed, centralised team with local contractor networks, guest vetting detail (ID checks, booking history), 30% direct bookings with repeat guests

top_objections.text: Prior damage experience — smashed bathroom door lock, cracked ceramic tiles from party guests; damage discovered too late for compensation with previous agency
top_objections.zac_response: Presented minute sensor (noise + WiFi device count), £200 security deposit or damage waiver, £100k insurance, ID checks, 30% direct booking repeat guests as layered protection mechanism

what_moved_them: Guest vetting details (ID checks, £200 security deposit, £100k insurance, 30% direct bookings with repeat guests)
Minute sensor recommendation — tangible, proactive damage detection tool addressing prior experience of discovering damage too late
what_fell_flat: Income figures — high competition (116 avg reviews in 1.3km radius) limits upside especially in year 1; do not lead with revenue

conversion_gaps.gap: Residual trust deficit from prior bad experience with local agency that failed to detect and compensate damage
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Follow-up email leading with specific anonymised damage incident Stayful resolved effectively, rather than general assurances. Reference minute sensor + deposit + insurance combination specifically.

offer_framing: 15%+VAT if signed by 30 June (described in notes as 'normally higher' — unusual vs 13%+VAT offers extended to other leads this week; confirm correct rate with Zac)
